courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: Machine Perception, LLM, or Classification Game
genericDescription: Use classification, recognition, language-model output, or signal interpretation; design around uncertainty; communicate confidence and latency.
specificDescription: Build a game that uses image, audio, gesture, text, player-behavior classification, or structured language-model output through an approved model, library, local model, API, or simulated service. Include confidence feedback, loading/failure states, fallback behavior, and secure handling of any keys or credentials.
gradingRubric: 30 pts model/service integration; 20 pts uncertainty and latency design; 20 pts player feedback; 15 pts fallback and safety; 15 pts documentation.
